questions.context_sentence: Match the words with the photos: 1 bicycle.
questions.cn: 将单词与照片匹配：1 自行车。
questions.hint: bi (双) + cycle (圆/圈)：两个轮子的圆圈，就是自行车。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Sometimes I take the bus.
questions.cn: 有时我坐公共汽车。
questions.hint: bus (巴士)：发音像“巴士”，大众的巴士。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She travelled by boat to the Caribbean.
questions.cn: 她乘船去加勒比海旅行。
questions.hint: bo (博) + at (在)：博击在水面上的就是小船boat。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: She travelled by ____ to the Caribbean.

questions.context_sentence: Match the words with the photos: 4 car.
questions.cn: 将单词与照片匹配：4 汽车。
questions.hint: car (卡)：发音像“卡”，卡车是车，小车也是car。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: There are times when planes are a necessity.
questions.cn: 有时飞机是必需的。
questions.hint: p (跑) + lane (车道)：在跑道上跑了之后飞起来的就是飞机plane。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She's taken a train across Canada.
questions.cn: 她乘坐火车横穿加拿大。
questions.hint: tr (拽) + ain (在)：拽着一串车厢在跑的就是火车train。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I've decided to write about travel.
questions.cn: 我决定写写关于旅行的事。
questions.hint: tr (他人) + a + vel (威尔)：和他人威尔一起去旅行travel。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But then she made a big decision.
questions.cn: 但后来她做了一个重大决定。
questions.hint: de (抵) + ci (制) + sion (名词后缀)：抵制诱惑，做出决定decision。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Her dream was to travel the world.
questions.cn: 她的梦想是环游世界。
questions.hint: dr (大人) + eam (爱美)：大人也爱美，因为他们有梦想dream。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Her ____ was to travel the world.

questions.context_sentence: So she sold her business and got rid of her belongings.
questions.cn: 所以她卖掉了她的生意，处理掉了她的财产。
questions.hint: be (是) + long (长久的) + ings：属于你的长久的东西就是财物belongings。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: but of course there are times when planes are a necessity.
questions.cn: 当然，有时飞机是必需品。
questions.hint: ne (哪) + ces (厕) + si (死) + ty：哪里没厕所真要急死人，厕所是生活必需品necessity。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She's worked for her accommodation in Hawaii.
questions.cn: 她在夏威夷工作以换取住宿。
questions.hint: ac + com (一起) + mod (模式) + a + tion：大家在一起住的模式就是住宿accommodation。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: She's worked for her ____ in Hawaii.

questions.context_sentence: She's had a lot of fantastic adventures.
questions.cn: 她有很多奇妙的冒险。
questions.hint: ad (增加) + venture (风险)：增加一点风险，就是冒险adventure。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Some of her experiences have not been easy ones.
questions.cn: 她的一些经历并不轻松。
questions.hint: ex (向外) + per (每一个) + i + ence：向外接触每一个东西的积累就是经历experience。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: after a cyclone hit their countries.
questions.cn: 在气旋袭击他们的国家之后。
questions.hint: cy (赛) + clone (克隆)：赛跑中克隆出的龙卷风，就是气旋cyclone。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Travel broadens the mind.
questions.cn: 旅游开阔眼界。
questions.hint: broad (宽阔的) + en (使动后缀)：使宽阔，即拓宽broaden。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: learning about other cultures
questions.cn: 了解其他文化。
questions.hint: cul (咖) + ture (去)：大家去喝咖（啡），是一种生活文化culture。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adj. 可怕的，令人厌恶的
questions.context_sentence: Have you ever eaten anything really horrible?
questions.cn: 你吃过什么真的很恶心的东西吗？
questions.hint: hor (吼) + ri (哩) + ble：吼得你心里哩哩啦啦地害怕，真的很可怕horrible。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Have you ever eaten anything really ____?

questions.context_sentence: Has anything really bad ever happened to you, like an accident?
questions.cn: 你身上发生过什么倒霉事吗，比如事故？
questions.hint: ac + ci (洗) + dent (凹痕)：洗车时发现车身上有凹痕，那是出了事故accident。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Tourists take suitcases with them.
questions.cn: 游客随身携带手提箱。
questions.hint: suit (西装) + case (盒子)：装西装的盒子，就是手提箱suitcase。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: travellers take backpacks.
questions.cn: 旅行者携带背包。
questions.hint: back (背) + pack (包裹)：背在背上的包裹，就是背包backpack。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Nora is a professional world traveller.
questions.cn: 诺拉是一位职业环球旅行家。
questions.hint: pro (向前) + fess (说) + ion + al：在大家面前专业地演说，就是专业的professional。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Someone who travels to many different places.
questions.cn: 去许多不同地方旅行的人。
questions.hint: dif (地) + fer (福) + ent：地理环境不同带来的福气也不同different。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: an incredible journey.
questions.cn: 一段难以置信的旅程。
questions.hint: in (不) + cred (相信) + ible (能够)：不能够相信的，即难以置信的incredible。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: travel doesn't have to be expensive.
questions.cn: 旅行不一定非得昂贵。
questions.hint: ex (向外) + pen (盆) + sive：向外端了两个盆才买得起，说明很贵expensive。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Her dream was to travel the world.
questions.cn: 她的梦想是环游世界。
questions.hint: travel (旅行) + world (世界)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But then she made a big decision.
questions.cn: 但后来她做了一个重大决定。
questions.hint: make (做) + decision (决定)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: But then she ____ a big decision.

questions.context_sentence: So she sold her business and got rid of her belongings.
questions.cn: 所以她卖掉了她的生意，处理掉了她的财产。
questions.hint: get (得到) + rid (摆脱) + of。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She works to earn enough money to have a good time.
questions.cn: 她工作赚钱是为了玩得开心。
questions.hint: earn (挣得) + money (钱)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Travel broadens the mind.
questions.cn: 旅游开阔眼界。
questions.hint: broaden (拓宽) + mind (头脑)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: He wants to get married and start a family.
questions.cn: 他想结婚并组建家庭。
questions.hint: start (开始) + family (家庭)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I've decided to write about travel.
questions.cn: 我决定写写关于旅行的事。
questions.hint: tr (他人) + a + vel (威尔)：和他人威尔一起去旅行travel。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But then she made a big decision.
questions.cn: 但后来她做了一个重大决定。
questions.hint: de (抵) + ci (制) + sion (名词后缀)：抵制诱惑，做出决定decision。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.cn: 她的梦想是环游世界。
questions.hint: dr (大人) + eam (爱美)：大人也爱美，因为他们有梦想dream。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.cn: 旅游开阔眼界。
questions.hint: broad (宽阔的) + en (使动后缀)：使宽阔，即拓宽broaden。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: earn (挣得) + money (钱)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.cn: 了解其他文化。
questions.hint: cul (咖) + ture (去)：大家去喝咖（啡），是一种生活文化culture。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.cn: 一段难以置信的旅程。
questions.hint: in (不) + cred (相信) + ible (能够)：不能够相信的，即难以置信的incredible。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.cn: 旅行不一定非得昂贵。
questions.hint: ex (向外) + pen (盆) + sive：向外端了两个盆才买得起，说明很贵expensive。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.cn: 去许多不同地方旅行的人。
questions.hint: dif (地) + fer (福) + ent：地理环境不同带来的福气也不同different。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Some of her experiences have not been easy ones.
questions.cn: 她的一些经历并不轻松。
questions.hint: ex (向外) + per (每一个) + i + ence：向外接触每一个东西的积累就是经历experience。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Some of her ____ have not been easy ones.

questions.cn: 有时飞机是必需的。
